content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Vasya and Robot". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1073/problem/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of points. Then n lines follow, each containing two integers x and y - the coordinates of the point.
content.outputFormat: Print the minimum number of moves required to visit all points.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
x = [0] * n
y = [0] * n
for i in range(n):
    x[i], y[i] = map(int, input().split())
ans = 0
for i in range(n - 1):
    ans += abs(x[i] - x[i + 1]) + abs(y[i] - y[i + 1])
print(ans)
